backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Patient, Treatment, Staff, Spending, Attendance, Session) and implementing access control with admin/user permissions, CRUD operations for all entities, backup/restore functionality, and user profile management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting accessibility improvements including ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, semantic HTML, color contrast, and screen reader announcements across frontend components with high confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing their accessibility features, ARIA attributes, semantic HTML structure, and functional responsibilities across pages, components, and hooks.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML template with lang attribute, viewport meta tag, and mounting point for the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component managing authentication flow, routing between pages (dashboard, patients, staff, finance, reports, backup, attendance, sessions), profile setup modal, and accessibility features including skip-to-content link and live region for screen reader announcements.
frontend/src/components/AIPrescriptionPa: AI-assisted prescription generation panel with predefined treatment templates for various conditions (post-surgery, chronic pain, sports injury, back pain, neck/shoulder, knee) including exercises, intensity, duration, frequency, and pricing with rich text editor support.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmDialog.ts: Reusable confirmation dialog component using AlertDialog from shadcn/ui for destructive actions with loading state support.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying clinic name, copyright year, and UTM-tracked caffeine.ai attribution link using hostname as app identifier.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main navigation header component with logo, navigation menu for different pages (dashboard, patients, staff, finance, reports, etc.), theme toggle, and user dropdown with logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/LiveRegion.tsx: Accessibility component that renders screen reader announcements using ARIA live regions with both polite and assertive modes.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Landing page component displaying clinic branding, key features (patient management, staff management, financial management, AI prescriptions), and Internet Identity login button.
frontend/src/components/MiscExpenseDialo: Dialog form for adding or editing miscellaneous expenses with fields for category, description, amount, and date.
frontend/src/components/PatientDialog.ts: Multi-tab dialog for creating/editing patient records with sections for basic info, treatments, AI prescription generation, and payment tracking.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their full name for profile setup, with validation and save functionality.
frontend/src/components/SkipToContent.ts: Accessibility component providing a skip link to jump directly to main content for keyboard and screen reader users.
frontend/src/components/SpendingDialog.t: Dialog form for adding or editing general spending/expense records with category selection, description, amount, and date fields.
frontend/src/components/StaffDialog.tsx: A dialog component for adding or editing staff members with form fields for name, position, phone, pay rate, and qualifications. Manages form state and handles submission via an onSave callback prop.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous actor instance based on Internet Identity state. Automatically invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAnnouncer.ts: Zustand store for managing screen reader announcements with polite or assertive modes. Provides an announce function that clears messages after 100ms to allow repeated announcements.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle. Provides login, logout, and status tracking functionality with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for all backend data operations including patients, staff, spendings, sessions, and backup data. Provides query and mutation hooks with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles with Tailwind CSS including OKLCH-based medical blue theme for light/dark modes, accessibility focus styles, and custom styles for React Quill editor and print media.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying summary statistics (patients, staff, revenue, debt), financial metrics (expenses, net income), and recent patient activity. Provides navigation to other sections via onNavigate prop.
frontend/src/pages/DataBackupPage.tsx: Provides UI for exporting, importing, merging, and resetting clinic data backups with file upload/download, progress tracking, and validation dialogs. Handles JSON serialization of BigInt timestamps and displays backup metadata including record counts and last backup time.
frontend/src/pages/FinancePage.tsx: Manages clinic finances with tabs for spendings and miscellaneous expenses, displaying totals, revenue, debt, and net income. Provides CRUD operations for both expense types with search filtering, confirmation dialogs, and summary cards showing financial metrics.
frontend/src/pages/OwnerDashboardPage.ts: Owner dashboard for monitoring employee location history with filtering by staff member and date range. Displays location records in a table with Google Maps links and includes a static map visualization of tracked locations.
frontend/src/pages/PatientReportPage.tsx: Generates comprehensive patient reports with summary statistics (total patients, revenue, debt, treatments) and detailed patient table. Supports printing and exporting data to CSV format with all patient information.
frontend/src/pages/PatientSessionsPage.t: Manages patient check-in/check-out sessions with treatment package tracking and visit numbering. Provides dialogs for editing check-in/check-out timestamps and displays session history filtered by patient with progress indicators.
frontend/src/pages/PatientsPage.tsx: Patient management page with CRUD operations, search/filter functionality, and table display of patient records including name, phone, and diagnosis.
frontend/src/pages/StaffAttendancePage.t: Staff attendance tracking page with clock-in/clock-out functionality, geolocation capture, and editable time records with filtering and reporting capabilities.
frontend/src/pages/StaffPage.tsx: Staff member management page with CRUD operations, search functionality by name/position/phone, and table display with reset all functionality.
frontend/src/pages/StaffReportPage.tsx: Staff reporting page displaying summary statistics, position counts, and exportable staff data in PDF/Excel/CSV formats with print functionality.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters and sessionStorage, supporting both regular query strings and hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, extended theme settings, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a healthcare management application with patient sessions, expenses, and authentication. Contains existing accessibility features (ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, semantic HTML, WCAG compliance) and pending feature requests for search/filter functionality.
